meaning: adj.多余的,剩下的,高而瘦的人的,少量的,贫乏的,备用的v.节约,节省,不伤害,宽恕,分让,提供给某人
examples: He could have taken a spare key.
How do you spend your spare time?
They don't have a lot of spare cash.
Forty Rockwell engineers are on-site to help manage spare parts and train factory workers.
But with only 2 million bpd of spare capacity left, this cushion is wearing thin.
